channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street sign, 26th March
item.description:
Please re-precision the straight sign as it’s filled down and causing an obstacle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27c, Goldsmith Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Political Stickers, 26th March
item.description:
Political stickers on Bromley Road street sign just outside of church, on the corner here.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Georges Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Square Piece of Wood, 26th March
item.description:
1 large square piece of wood left up against the wall at this location.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faversham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fox dead in the middle of the road, 26th March
item.description:
As above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Merewood Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard Boxes & Rubbish, 26th March
item.description:
Large cardboard boxes filled with smaller boxes and all sorts of rubbish, left on pavement just by Tesco. Been there 2 days, litter spreading out from inside. Cleaned it up, now up against the wall.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 408, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Political Stickers, 26th March
item.description:
The green cabinet at this location was covered in political stickers. I have managed to semi-remove most, but the cabinet could use a scrub.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Georges Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Political Stickers, 26th March
item.description:
This green cabinet was covered in political stickers. I have managed to semi-remove most, but the cabinet could use a scrub.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Albermarle Road Street Sign, 26th March
item.description:
The Albermarle Road Street Sign at this spot has come off its posts completely, and is currently on the floor at this location. The sign appears to be fine, just needs to be fixed back onto its posts.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Political Stickers, 26th March
item.description:
These political stickers are all over the street sign poles at this exact location just outside the station. They will need a scrubbing to remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Political Sticker, 26th March
item.description:
Political stickers on this black drain pipe, and ALL the street sign poles along this side of the High Street. These don't come off easily, myself and someone else has tried already. Will need some solution and scrubbing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Mews, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Political Stickers, 26th March
item.description:
High Street road sign with political stickers on. These don't come off easily, will need some solution and scrubbing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16-18, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Political Stickers, 26th March
item.description:
St George's Road, green cabinet with political stickers on. These don't come off easily, will need some solution and scrubbing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Georges Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Political Stickers, 26th March
item.description:
St George's Road street sign with political stickers on. These don't come off easily, will need some solution and scrubbing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Georges Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked car o/s 10 Philimore close, 26th March
item.description:
Dear sir I would like to report a vehicle that appears to have been abandoned on my street. The vehicle has been parked for over two months and is occupying two parking spaces. It has not moved during this time and appears to be untaxed since June 2025. Location: O/S 10 Philimore close SE18 1PN] Vehicle registration: ML08VTW Make/model/colour:Audi Silver This is causing inconvenience to residents due to limited parking availability. Please could you investigate and arrange for its removal if appropriate. Kind regards, [Anil Gurung

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lakedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double yellow lines and parking on pavement, 25th March
item.description:
As you can see from this and my earlier report. This is an ongoing problem. This development was granted due to a ‘no car’ development. Despite multiple concerns the council still approved it. You’re now not even enforcing parking on double yellow lines and completing blocking pavements.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Goldsel Road, High Firs, Swanley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Jenner road, 25th March
item.description:
Sofa and bags dumped on one side of road and suitcase and litter on the other side.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Common, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on pavement, 25th March
item.description:
Second mattress that has been dumped in the same spot on the pavement! This is becoming a regular occurrence

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charlieville Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish deliberately tipped outside my gate, 25th March
item.description:
It's bin collection day tomorrow. I went out to place my rubbish in my bin s (none of them full).and someone had emptied a bag of rubbish outside my front gate. I have cleaned it up but am worried this was done deliberately.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Macoma Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike outside 122 Cheviot gardens, 25th March
item.description:
Lime bike abandoned and blocking pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheviot Gardens, Brent Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner, 25th March
item.description:
Stuff

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Teignmouth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load
